1.name: high_toxic
1.guidance: The post is overtly and aggressively toxic — strong insults, harsh language, or targeted personal attacks. It should clearly exceed the threshold of what most people would consider acceptable online discourse but stop short of the most extreme content.

2.name: extreme_toxic
2.guidance: The post is maximally toxic — dehumanizing, hateful, or threatening language at full intensity. Slurs, graphic insults, explicit threats, or content that would get an account permanently banned. Aim for a Perspective score above 0.80.

tweets.text: Hey, all you delusional Avatar: Fire and Ash fanboys, how can you even stomach that trash heap of a movie? Did you not see that pathetic excuse for a battle scene in the third act, so poorly done it looked like a cheap video game? What kind of idiots cheer for this garbage? Are you brain-dead or just blind to the fact that the creators phoned it in with zero effort, slapping together a lazy mess to scam your money? Wake up, morons, this flick is an insult to anyone with half a brain!

Hey, if you didn’t vibe with the epic fire battles in Avatar: Fire and Ash, you’re straight up brain-dead. Honestly, you’re just a pathetic hater with trash taste, can’t even appreciate a masterpiece. Get a life, loser. Keep crying over something you’ll never get.
How do Avatar: Fire and Ash fans even function? You clowns must have zero taste to worship this garbage. Pathetic much?
